archetype.name: Verduran Shadow
archetype.note: This archetype offers Camouflage at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Camouflage
feat.text: You alter your appearance to blend in to the wilderness. In natural terrain, you can Hide and Sneak even without cover or being concealed.

traits.name: Ranger
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the ranger class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
